tasks.subject: Task 1: Dev infrastructure (Compose, go tool pins, justfile)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Stand up reproducible dev env — postgres:17 Compose service, sqlc/goose pinned as `go tool` deps, `.env.example`, and a `justfile`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/compose.yaml", "backend/.env.example", "backend/justfile", "backend/go.mod"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && just db-up && go tool goose --version && go tool sqlc version && just --list", "acceptanceCriteria": ["just db-up starts healthy postgres:17", "go tool goose/sqlc print versions", "just --list shows documented recipes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Schema migration 0001
tasks.description:
**Goal:** goose migration creating enums + users/groups/memberships with indexes and FKs.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/migrations/0001_init.sql"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && just db-up && just migrate", "acceptanceCriteria": ["just migrate applies cleanly", "just migrate-down reverses cleanly", "memberships shows both indexes and two FKs"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Dev seed
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Re-runnable seed.sql (1 group + 5 active core members), applied via `just seed`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/seed.sql"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && just seed && just seed && docker compose exec -T db psql -U movie -d movienight -c \"SELECT count(*) FROM memberships;\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["seed inserts 1 group, 5 users, 5 memberships", "re-running seed is idempotent"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: sqlc query + codegen
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Write ListGroupMembers query and generate internal/db package (uuid → google/uuid.UUID).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/sqlc.yaml", "backend/internal/db/query/roster.sql", "backend/internal/db/db.go", "backend/internal/db/models.go", "backend/internal/db/roster.sql.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && just sqlc && go build ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["just sqlc generates three files", "ListGroupMembers takes uuid.UUID returns ID/Name/Role rows", "go build passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Handler pure functions + unit tests (TDD)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure parseGroupID + toMemberDTOs with table-driven unit tests, no DB, no doubles. Tests first.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/roster.go", "backend/roster_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && go test ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["parseGroupID ok/err cases", "toMemberDTOs preserves order, stringifies fields", "toMemberDTOs(nil) returns non-nil empty slice", "go test passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Wire pgxpool + handler in main.go
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Open pgxpool from DATABASE_URL at startup, register GET /groups/{groupId}/members wired to *db.Queries via a small store interface (no mocks).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/main.go", "backend/roster.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && go build ./... && go vet ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["main reads DATABASE_URL, aborts on connect failure", "400 bad uuid / 500 db error / 200 array", "healthz still works", "build+vet pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Integration test (testcontainers-go)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Build-tagged integration test: postgres:17 + goose migrate + fixtures (incl. inactive member + empty group), drive handler via httptest with real *db.Queries.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/roster_integration_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && just test-integration", "acceptanceCriteria": ["guarded by //go:build integration", "asserts rotation order, inactive excluded, 400, empty group 200 []", "go test ./... still skips container"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Expo roster screen
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Single-screen Expo (TS) app fetching GET /groups/{id}/members, rendering FlatList with loading/error/empty states.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/App.tsx", "mobile/.env.example"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["fetches roster on mount from EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL", "renders name+role; loading/error/empty states", "tsc --noEmit passes"]}
```
